{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Blackflame portal
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Blackflame portal]] to the Arelius homeland is expected to open in about two years.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
